summary: Patient Data Encryption and Audit Trails Test
description: Validate that patient data is encrypted using AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
objective: Verify compliance with FDA Part 11 and ISO 9001 standards for medical device software lifecycle processes.
prerequisites: System is configured to use AES-256 encryption
Database is set up to store audit trails

test_steps.description: Enter a new patient record into the system
Inspect the stored patient data to verify it is encrypted using AES-256
Trigger an action that requires database changes (e.g. update patient record)
Observe the system's response to verify audit trails are stored

expected_result: Data is encrypted with AES-256 and system behaves as per requirement
acceptance_criteria: System encrypts patient data using AES-256
Audit trails are stored for every database change
